title: Tripwires decouple provenance from decision—enable progressive enforcement
context: Regression Guard catches re-adding retired code. Rejected alternatives (prose in alternatives_rejected field) never existed in code, so re-introducing them is undetected. Need machine-checkable signals for rejected approaches without blocking too early. Touches invariant(s): con_03a0b94b2e (The agent hook must never block an edit on failure: any error or unrecognized input emits nothing and exits 0); con_2ce3f2a547 (Synthesis must run on the Claude subscription, never the pay-per-token API: strip ANTHROPIC_API_KEY and ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN from the spawned env); con_902759b3dc (All JSON writes to .hunch/ must be atomic (temp-file + rename) so an interrupted write can never truncate the index); con_a87360128b (Semantic vectors are a derived layer in SQLite, never the source of truth; reconcile by content hash on reindex); con_e04226bd05 (The MCP server must stay client-agnostic: all assistants point to the same .hunch/ graph; no Claude-only behavior in the server).
decision: Rejected alternatives become tripwires (forbidden deps/symbols/patterns scoped by glob). Tripwires carry their OWN provenance (llm_draft vs human_confirmed), independent of decision's confidence. Only human-confirmed tripwires block; llm_draft is advisory regardless of decision tier. Enforcement is deterministic: set-intersection over vouched records, no model in block path.
consequences: Rejected alternatives (previously uncatchable prose) become machine-checkable
Progressive enforcement: advisory llm_draft → human confirm → hard block, prevents premature over-blocking
Deterministic blocking path (set operations on human-vouched tripwires only, no inference)
Enforcement power scales with curation: more confirmed tripwires = more catching power
Agents prevented from re-introducing rejected approaches (closes regression guard gap for prose decisions)
alternatives_rejected: Inherit tripwire provenance from decision—can't support advisory-only phase
Block immediately on any tripwire match—over-aggressive, blocks early drafts
Semantic-tier only enforcement—can't be deterministic without human signals
New dedicated MCP tool for veto—rejected per dec_bfc5d05de7

rejected_tripwires.alternative: Inherit tripwire provenance from decision—can't support advisory-only phase
